summary: Iteration 22 testing complete. All 5 features verified: 1) Page caching works (instant navigation between pages), 2) Input fields responsive (description & recipient fill in <1s), 3) Circle stamp uses SVG textPath for CURVED text in preview AND backend uses draw_curved_text(), 4) Verification page shows description field, 5) Top bar (CardHeader) is sticky with solid bg-[#0f1729] background.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Login with test credentials - PASS
POST /api/documents/stamp (shape=circle) - Circle stamp with curved text - PASS
GET /api/verify/stamp/{id} - Verify returns description field - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Page caching - Navigate between pages instantly (1/3 → 2/3) - PASS
Input responsiveness - Description fills in 0.64s - PASS
Input responsiveness - Recipient fills in 0.42s - PASS
Circle stamp preview - SVG textPath with '★ TLS VERIFIED ★' and 'SCAN TO VERIFY' - PASS
Verification page - Description displayed: 'This is a TEST description for verification page testing' - PASS
Sticky top bar - CardHeader has 'sticky top-0 z-20 bg-[#0f1729]' (solid background) - PASS

page_caching.description: pageCache state stores rendered pages for instant navigation
page_caching.test_result: Page navigation between 1/3 and 2/3 is instant

input_responsiveness.description: localDescription and localRecipientName state variables used for immediate updates
input_responsiveness.test_result: Description fills in 0.64s, Recipient fills in 0.42s

circle_stamp_curved_text.frontend_preview: Uses SVG with <textPath> elements for curved text (lines 1355-1466)
circle_stamp_curved_text.backend_generation: Uses draw_curved_text() function with character rotation (lines 594-648)
circle_stamp_curved_text.text_content: ★ TLS VERIFIED ★ (top arc) and SCAN TO VERIFY (bottom arc)

verification_description.description: VerifyPage.jsx shows result.description in Document Information section
verification_description.test_result: Description text visible in verification result

sticky_top_bar.description: CardHeader has sticky positioning with solid background

seed_data_creation: Test stamps with TEST_ prefix created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features from this iteration verified working: page caching for fast navigation, responsive input fields, circle stamp curved text (SVG textPath in frontend + draw_curved_text in backend), verification page shows description, sticky top bar with solid background. Test PDF at /tmp/test_multipage.pdf.
